title: Error while executing openItemCard in dashboard widget
excerpt:
Hi there, 
I am facing an issue while opening the item card inside a dashboard widget using the function 
monday.execute(‘openItemCard’, { itemId: itemId, kind: ‘columns’ }) 
This seems to be working fine in a board view…

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,
I am facing an issue while opening the item card inside a dashboard widget using the function

monday.execute(‘openItemCard’, { itemId: itemId, kind: ‘columns’ })

This seems to be working fine in a board view app
The sdk version in my package.json is “monday-sdk-js”: “^0.1.6”,

image1171×98 6.84 KB

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @kranthi_thoughtflow,

A fix was deployed for the SDK a few hours ago.

Would you be able to check if the issue still persists?

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks @Matias.Monday . It works great now

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @kranthi_thoughtflow I am glad that’s the case!

Let us know if you need anything else

Cheers,
Matias
